title: Data layer — DuckDB-WASM integration + React hooks
description: Integrate DuckDB-WASM with React. Create custom hooks: useQuery(sql), useTeamData(abbrev), usePlayerProfile(id). Load parquet files from sql_lab/tables/. Pre-register 163 views from views.sql. Connection pooling + error boundaries.
deferred_reason: Sprint 5 close-out: DuckDB-WASM integration is high-complexity Deep Work. TKT-210 (project setup) is DONE. Deferred to Sprint 6 alongside TKT-211 (design system) — both are React infrastructure prerequisites.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Deferred to Sprint 6. Dependency TKT-210 is DONE. Brad Stevens to co-own with KDB given DuckDB-WASM complexity. Sprint 6 P0.
